description: Phishing templates impersonating hotel and travel booking services

templates.name: Hotel Reservation Confirmation
suggested_subject_lines: Upcoming stay: Credit card on file needs updating
templates.notes: Best for frequent business travelers. Timed near known travel periods for maximum effectiveness.

templates.name: Marriott Bonvoy – Points Expiring
suggested_subject_lines: Your Marriott Bonvoy points expire in 7 days
Action needed: 12,500 Bonvoy points about to expire
Don't lose your Marriott Bonvoy rewards
templates.notes: Loyalty-expiry lure. Pairs well with the existing hotel reservation template for a hospitality-sector campaign.

templates.name: Booking.com – Reservation Payment Hold
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: your reservation is on hold
Confirm payment to secure your Booking.com reservation
Your upcoming stay could be cancelled
templates.notes: Payment-hold urgency is highly credible for anyone with travel booked. Avoids implausible technical claims.
